title: Milestone 4: Validate, dogfood, and restart the live MCP runtime
summary: Milestone 4 is complete: targeted core, query, and MCP contract tests ran, contract rollout dogfooding feedback was recorded, and the release prism-cli/prism-mcp binaries were rebuilt with a healthy live daemon restart.

acceptance.label: Core storage, query lookup, and MCP mutation or resource surfaces have targeted test coverage for the first contracts path
Dogfooding yields at least one recorded validation outcome or feedback item about the contracts rollout
After meaningful MCP or query-surface changes, the release binaries are rebuilt and the live MCP daemon is restarted and health-checked
